violations.text: The establishment's hand sink is lacking a splash guard for the side closest to the 3-bay sink. Hand sinks shall have a splash guard to prevent potential contamination from facilities. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2025

Wood is used in the construction of the 3-bay sink legs in the ware washing area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2025
The cleaning wastewater from the ice cream mixing machine is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 10/12/2025

The ceiling vents in the preparation area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2025

The establishment's hand sink is lacking a splash guard for the side closest to the 3-bay sink. Hand sinks shall have a splash guard to prevent potential contamination from facilities. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2025

Wood is used in the construction of the 3-bay sink legs in the ware washing area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2025
